steps.observed: JS eval confirmed: hasUndefined=false, hasNull=false, hasNaN=false

evidence.accessibilitySnapshot: Full accessibility tree captured showing 7 direction rows with complete data (heat change, time window, confidence, judgment labels, descriptions)

assertions.title: All 5 pages work with real data

steps.expected: Movement board populated, judgment summary visible, no empty sections, no JS errors
steps.observed: 7 direction rows in movement board, Today's Judgments with 4 states, 值得关注方向 section with 4 directions, 风险提醒 with 4 risk items, 最近证据 with 6 evidence cards, 产品线观察 with 4 product lines, 14天变化 with rising/cooling sections. 0 JS errors.

steps.expected: Bubble matrix with direction bubbles, no empty sections, no JS errors
steps.observed: Stats showing 7 directions, bubble matrix SVG with all 7 streetwear directions labeled, judgment state legend present. 0 JS errors.

steps.expected: Direction detail with sections populated (overview, product lines, evidence), no JS errors
steps.observed: 廓形风格 detail loaded with: 方向总览 (heat +15%, confidence 中, judgment 短热噪音), 一句话建议, 产品线决策卡 (上装, 下装), 为什么会涨 section with content cues, 风险提醒, 证据入口 with 3 evidence cards. 0 JS errors.

steps.expected: Evidence cards populated, filters present, no empty sections, no JS errors
steps.observed: 28 evidence cards displayed with direction filters (7 directions), type filters (笔记/图片/评论), freshness filters. Each card shows weight, type, freshness, score, and related direction. 0 JS errors.

steps.expected: Product lines with strengthening/weakening directions, no empty sections, no JS errors
steps.observed: 4 product lines (上装, 下装, 外套, 配饰) each showing opportunity/risk levels, status (稳定), 0 strengthening and 2 weakening directions per line. Direction links navigate to detail pages. 0 JS errors.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 5 dashboard pages load with pipeline-generated streetwear data, 0 JS console errors across all pages, no undefined/null/NaN values, all primary content sections populated.
